Local manufacturing

Blinds and insect screens, made precisely for your space

Winsome manufactures, measures, and installs blinds and insect screen systems for homes, apartments, and workplaces—locally.

Request a consultation View products

Products

Blinds and Insect Screen Systems

Choose the right system for your space — from pleated to vertical, from roller to insect protection screens.

Pleated Blinds

A compact, elegant pleated system for small, medium, and non-standard windows.

Details →

Roller Blinds

A minimalist roller system that suits apartments, offices, and contemporary interiors.

Details →

Zebra Blinds

Zebra (day-and-night) blinds for flexible control of light and privacy.

Details →

Roman Blinds

Soft, fabric-forward Roman blinds for residential and hospitality spaces.

Details →

Faux Wood Blinds

Wide-slat blinds with a wood-grain look for a warmer, more defined interior character.

Details →

Vertical Blinds

A practical vertical system for wide and tall glazing.

Details →

Horizontal Blinds

Classic horizontal blinds with precise control, easy care, and broad applications.

Details →

Pleated Insect Screen

A pleated mesh system for doors and windows where you want airflow and insect protection.

Details →

Hinged Insect Screen

Hinged insect screens for doors and windows where quick open-and-close access matters.

Details →
Full Catalog

Why Winsome

Local production, precise fit and refined results

Our brand is built on quality materials, clean installation and real practicality for Georgian residential and commercial spaces.

Local manufacturing

Production in Georgia means flexible timelines, better communication, and a tighter fit for every project.

Clean installation

Each installation is planned to protect your interior and deliver a neat, finished result.

Real variety

Our range combines fabric blinds, slat systems, and insect screens for windows, balcony doors, and high-traffic openings.

Precise fit

Every system is built for the exact window, door, opening, or profile—not pulled from a generic catalog size.

Process

A simple path from consultation to final installation

A transparent, smooth process for apartments, offices and commercial projects in Tbilisi and across Georgia.

01

Consultation

We select the right system, material, color, and usage scenario for each room or opening.

02

Measuring

We take accurate on-site measurements and confirm installation details before production.

03

Production

Your chosen fabric, mechanism, mesh, and profile are produced locally.

04

Installation

We complete a clean install, test operation, and share care tips.

Questions

Questions customers ask most before getting a quote

All FAQ
Do you manufacture blinds locally in Georgia? +

Yes. Winsome is positioned as a local manufacturer in Tbilisi, which allows for a more precise fit, flexible timelines, and better control over the final quality. Production reflects the specifics of the Georgian market, and our local approach lets us respond quickly to individual requests. We serve Tbilisi, Batumi, Kutaisi, Rustavi, Gori, and other cities across Georgia.

Do you help choose fabric, slat, or mesh systems? +

Yes. During consultation we review room type, light intensity, privacy needs, profile color, and the system that will be most practical for each opening. For example, a bedroom may benefit from blackout fabric, while a kitchen may need a moisture-resistant, easy-to-clean option. Consultation is free—you can reach us by phone or WhatsApp.

Do you offer measuring and installation? +

Yes. The full process includes consultation, on-site measuring, custom production, and professional installation. Measuring is done on site so every detail—including opening shape, profile type, and installation space—is accounted for. After installation we check system operation and provide care recommendations.

Direct Contact

Need a quick answer about a product, measurements or installation?

Call us directly or send a request with room type, photos and approximate measurements.

Get in touch and we will help you choose the right blinds, roller shades, or insect screen system for your windows and doors.
